title: Shared frontmatter fields
description: Required provenance fields present on every entity. Per-entity schemas extend this via allOf.

id.description: Stable kebab-case id. Must match the filename (without .md).

source.description: Which capture path produced this entry.

captured_at.description: YYYY-MM-DD, when this entry was first created.

last_verified.description: YYYY-MM-DD, last time a human confirmed this is still accurate.

last_confirmed.description: Optional YYYY-MM-DD freshness marker for facts that need periodic reconfirmation.

durability.description: Whether the fact is expected to remain true or needs a freshness check.

ttl_days.description: Optional number of days before a perishable fact should be reconfirmed.
